aeo_readiness.summary: Savoy Services has significant room for improvement in AEO readiness. The website lacks structured data, has repetitive and thin content, and does not leverage local SEO best practices.
quick_wins: Implement schema markup to enhance search engine understanding of the business.
Diversify and expand website content to include detailed service descriptions, customer testimonials, and location-specific information.
Optimize the website for mobile devices and improve page load speed.

gbp_analysis.found: The website mentions 'Round Rock, TX' and 'Austin, TX', but lacks comprehensive local SEO elements such as a Google Business Profile (GBP).
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has not claimed or optimized a Google Business Profile, missing out on local search visibility and customer engagement opportunities.
critical_issues: Inconsistent or incomplete NAP (Name, Address, Phone number) information across the website.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent NAP information across the website, which can confuse search engines and potential customers.
action_items: Verify and standardize NAP information across the website and all online platforms.
Create and maintain consistent citations on reputable local business directories and citation sites.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and local SEO optimization.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers using voice search or AI-driven search engines.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement schema markup and claim and optimize a Google Business Profile.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establish the business as a local authority by creating high-quality, locally relevant content and engaging with the community through online platforms.

page_title: Savoy Services: Reliable HVAC in Austin, TX
